steps.assistant_text: Existing C body was correct; the fix was a Makefile dual-target so PROLOGUE_STEALS runs on the non_matching build too (per feedback_prologue_steals_belongs_on_non_matching_too.md). 4 functions in a chain — 074C/0790/07D4/0818 — share the same recipe + predecessor's stolen lui+addiu prologue (v0=&D_00000000).

metadata.verification: Built byte-correct since chain commit; fuzzy promoted from 86.66% to 100% by dual-targeting PROLOGUE_STEALS Makefile rule to non_matching/ in addition to byte-correct path.
